title: Claude Tool Use
description: Schema for Anthropic Claude tool use system including tool definitions, tool use blocks, tool results, and server-provided tools for agentic workflows.

ToolDefinition.title: Tool Definition
ToolDefinition.description: A custom tool definition that can be provided to Claude for function calling. Tools enable Claude to interact with external systems and perform actions.

name.description: The name of the tool. Must be unique within the tools array and match the pattern ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$.

description.description: A detailed plain-language description of what the tool does, when it should be used, what each parameter means, and any important caveats. More detail leads to better tool use by the model.

ToolInputSchema.title: Tool Input Schema
ToolInputSchema.description: A JSON Schema object defining the expected input parameters for the tool. Must be of type 'object'.

type.description: The schema type. Must be 'object' for tool input schemas.

properties.description: An object where each key is a parameter name and the value is a JSON Schema describing that parameter.

required.description: List of parameter names that are required for this tool.

additionalProperties.description: Whether additional properties beyond those defined are allowed.

ToolInputProperty.title: Tool Input Property
ToolInputProperty.description: JSON Schema for a single tool input parameter.

type.description: The JSON Schema type of this parameter.

description.description: A description of what this parameter represents.

enum.description: A list of allowed values for this parameter.

items.description: Schema for array items, when type is 'array'.

properties.description: Properties of a nested object, when type is 'object'.

required.description: Required properties for a nested object.

ToolChoice.title: Tool Choice
ToolChoice.description: Controls how Claude uses the provided tools. Determines whether tool use is automatic, forced, or disabled.

type.description: The tool choice strategy. 'auto' lets Claude decide, 'any' requires at least one tool call, 'tool' forces a specific tool, 'none' prevents tool use.

name.description: The name of the specific tool to force. Required when type is 'tool'.

disable_parallel_tool_use.description: When true, Claude will only use one tool at a time rather than making parallel tool calls.

ToolUseBlock.title: Tool Use Block
ToolUseBlock.description: A content block in Claude's response indicating that it wants to invoke a tool. The id must be passed back in the corresponding tool_result block.

type.description: The content block type. Always 'tool_use' for tool invocations.

id.description: A unique identifier for this tool use block. Must be passed back in the tool_result to match the result to this invocation.

name.description: The name of the tool being invoked. Matches one of the tool names provided in the request.

input.description: The input arguments for the tool, conforming to the tool's input_schema.

ToolResultBlockParam.title: Tool Result Block Parameter
ToolResultBlockParam.description: A content block providing the result of a tool invocation back to Claude. Must reference the tool_use_id from the corresponding ToolUseBlock.

tool_use_id.description: The id from the ToolUseBlock that this result corresponds to.

content.description: The result of the tool call. Can be a simple string or an array of content blocks for richer results including images.

is_error.description: Set to true if the tool execution resulted in an error. Claude will use this to understand what went wrong and potentially retry or adjust its approach.

TextContentBlock.title: Text Content Block
TextContentBlock.description: A text content block used within tool results.

ImageContentBlock.title: Image Content Block
ImageContentBlock.description: An image content block used within tool results.

ServerTool.title: Server Tool
ServerTool.description: A server-provided tool that Anthropic hosts and executes. These tools do not require client-side implementation.

name.description: The display name for the server tool.

max_uses.description: Maximum number of times this tool can be used in a single request.

ToolUseConversationTurn.title: Tool Use Conversation Turn
ToolUseConversationTurn.description: A complete tool use conversation pattern showing the request-response cycle: (1) user sends a message, (2) Claude responds with tool_use, (3) user sends tool_result, (4) Claude provides final answer.

initial_request.description: The initial user message that triggers tool use.

tool_use_response.description: Claude's response containing a tool_use block.

tool_result_message.description: The user message containing the tool result.

final_response.description: Claude's final response incorporating the tool result.

CacheControl.title: Cache Control
CacheControl.description: Cache control settings for prompt caching.
